Log:

  - Pass maintainership to submitter

Modified:

Modified: head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Annotate/Makefile
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Annotate/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:08 2014	(r355385)

 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Represent a series of changes in annotate form
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1

+

 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
